positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a majestic, roaring lion's head, viewed straight on. The lion's mane and facial features are stylized with sharp, geometric lines and bold outlines. The design uses a limited color palette of deep sapphire blue, burnt orange, and cream accents. The style is modern graphic pop art, reminiscent of mid-century textile prints. Composition is perfectly centered and symmetrically balanced. The background should be solid, high-contrast cream or white, ensuring the lion's silhouette pops dramatically. Clean lines, suitable for screen printing on fabric.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low detail, photographic, realistic photo, gradient background
